nodes.itemHTML:
• 2D
    • imguistars42.2k - Immediate Mode Graphical User interface. [MIT]
    • Skia - Google's 2D graphics library has a Vulkan backend, demonstrated in a cross-platform sample application with its own window library. [BSD 3-clause] website
    • VKVGstars574 - Vulkan 2D graphics library, API follows the same pattern as Cairo graphics lib, but with new functions.

• Compute
    • libvcstars127 - Vulkan Compute for C++. [LICENSE]
    • Vulkan Komputestars972 - Blazing fast and lightweight Vulkan Compute Framework optimized for advanced GPU processing usecases. [Apache License 2.0]
    • ncnnstars15.7k - High-performance neural network inference framework with Vulkan based GPU inference. [BSD 3-clause]
    • vuhstars318 - Vulkan-based C++ GPGPU computing framework. [MIT]
    • VkFFTstars915 - Efficient Vulkan FFT library [MPL-2.0 License]

• Low Level
    • Vulkan Memory Allocatorstars1.8k - Easy to integrate Vulkan memory allocation library from AMD. [MIT]
      • [VulkanMemoryAllocator-Hpp] (https://github.com/malte-v/VulkanMemoryAllocator-Hppstars37) - C++ Bindings for VMA, like Vulkan-HPP
    • Fossilizestars32 - serialization format for various persistent Vulkan object types. [MIT]
    • vk-bootstrapstars397 - C++ utility library to jump start Vulkan development by automating instance, physical device, device, and swapchain creation. [MIT]
    • Google's vulkan-cpp-librarystars250 - Vulkan abstraction library using C++11 for memory, resource management, type and thread safety as well as system independency. [Apache]
    • FrameGraphstars362 - Vulkan abstraction layer that represent frame as a task graph. [BSD 2-clause]
    • V-EZstars778 - light-weight middleware layer for the Vulkan API targeting Professional Workstation ISVs. [MIT]
    • Vookoostars449 - Vookoo is a set of dependency-free utilities to assist in the construction and updating of Vulkan graphics data structres. [MIT]
    • vppstars261 - Modern C++ Vulkan Abstraction focused on performance and a straightforward interface. [MIT]
    • VulkanSceneGraph - Vulkan/C++17 scene graph project, successor to OpenSceneGraph.
    • Vulkan-WSIWindowstars100 - Multi-platform library to create a Vulkan window, and handle input events. [Apache License 2.0]
    • Screen 13stars87 - An easy-to-use Vulkan render graph for Rust. [MIT]

• Frameworks, Engines, Higher Level Rendering
    • Auto-Vkstars108 - Vulkan convenience and productivity layer for modern C++, atop Vulkan-Hpp, by the Research Unit of Computer Graphics, TU Wien. [MIT]
    • Auto-Vk-Toolkitstars209 - C++ framework around Auto-Vkstars108 for rapid prototyping, research, and teaching, by the Research Unit of Computer Graphics, TU Wien. [MIT for the framework's code]
    • Falcorstars1.8k - Real-time rendering framework from NVIDIA, supporting mainly DX12, with experimental Vulkan support. [BSD 3-clause]
    • The-Forgestars3.2k - DirectX 12, Vulkan, macOS Metal 2 rendering framework. [Apache License 2.0]
    • Diligent Enginestars2.5k - a modern cross-platform low-level graphics library that supports OpenGL/GLES, Direct3D11/12 and Vulkan. [Apache License 2.0]
    • DemoFrameworkstars173 - NXP GTEC C++11 cross-platform demo framework including lots of samples for Vulkan, OpenGL ES, OpenVX, OpenCL, OpenVG and OpenCV. [BSD-3-clause]
    • bgfxstars12.2k - Cross-platform, graphics API agnostic, "Bring Your Own Engine/Framework" style rendering library. [BSD-2-clause]
    • Cinderstars5k and the story behind. [BSD]
    • openFrameworksstars64 - the most famouse C++ creative coding framework. [MIT]
    • bsfstars1.7k - Modern C++14 library for the development of real-time graphical applications. [MIT]
    • glfwstars9.7k and the guide. [LICENSE]
    • SDL - added cross-platform Vulkan graphics support in SDL_vulkan.h. [zlib]
    • Acidstars1.4k - A high speed C++17 Vulkan game engine. [MIT]
    • liblavastars549 - A modern C++ and easy-to-use framework. [MIT]
    • AMD's Anvilstars565 - cross-platform framework for Vulkan. [LICENSE]
    • Introductory Vulkan samplestars104. [MIT]
    • Intrinsic Enginestars1k - Intrinsic is a Vulkan based cross-platform graphics and game engine. [Apache License 2.0]
    • Spectrumstars15 - Work-in-progress framework and abstraction layer around Vulkan.
    • VkHLFstars326 - Vulkan High Level Framework. [LICENSE]
    • Lugdunumstars235 - Modern cross-platform 3D rendering engine built with Vulkan and modern C++14. [MIT]
    • Pumexstars284 - cross-platform Vulkan renderer implementing frame graph and simple scene graph. Able to render on many surfaces at once [MIT]
    • small3d, Tiny Vulkan based C++ cross-platform game development framework [BSD 3-clause]
    • Logistars11 - Light-weight object oriented Vulkan abstraction framework. [BSD 2-clause]
    • PowerVR SDKstars583 - C++ cross-platform 3D graphics SDK to speed up development of Vulkan and GLES. [LICENSE]

• Other API Interop and Implementations
    • visorstars37 - Vulkan Ignoble Software Rasterizer. [MIT]
    • VulkanOnD3D12 - Vulkan API for D3D12. [Apache License 2.0]
    • rostkatzestars80 - C++ implementation of Vulkan sitting on D3D12 🐈[Apache License 2.0]
    • VK9 - Direct3D 9 compatibility layer using Vulkan
    • VUDAstars439 - header-only lib that provides a CUDA Runtime API interface. [MIT]
    • clspvstars493 - prototype compiler for a subset of OpenCL C to Vulkan compute shaders. [Apache License 2.0]
    • MoltenVKstars3.6k - run Vulkan on iOS and macOS. [Apache-2.0]
    • Zink - OpenGL implementation on top of Vulkan, part of Mesa project. [MIT]
    • glo / OpenGL Overloadstars277 - OpenGL implementation on top of Vulkan.
    • gfx-portabilitystars354 - Vulkan Portability implementation on Metal and D3D12, based on gfx-rsstars5.2k.

• Raytracing
    • Quartzstars406 - Physically based Vulkan RTX path tracer with a declarative ES7-like scene description language. [LGPL-3.0]

• Scientific
    • datovizstars393 - High-performance GPU interactive scientific data visualization with Vulkan. [MIT]
    • iMSTK - C++ toolkit for building surgical simulations with Vulkan and VTK backends. [Apache License 2.0]

• Shaders
    • glslangstars2.3k - Library for compiling glsl to spirv [BSD 3-Clause]
    • SPIRV-Crossstars1.5k - Library for reflection of spirv, simplify the creation of Vulkan pipeline layouts [ Apache-2.0 License]
• VK²stars98, Kotlin Wrapper for Vulkan: code expressiveness and safety meet graphic power [Apache License 2.0]

• Learning Tensorflow.js: Powerful Machine Learning in JavaScript - In this guide, author Gant Laborde provides a hands-on, end-to-end approach to TensorFlow.js fundamentals for a broad technical audience that includes data scientists, engineers, web developers, students, and researchers.
• Openbase
• Kindmetrics - Privacy focused website analytics made in Crystal - Hosted in the EU.
• Counter - Web Analytics made simple and therefore privacy friendly.
• macos-sdks-vs-gccstars1 - Provides GCC 'specs' files to cope with SDK policy changes.
• ux-stringsstars6 - Unicode extended strings.
• Foci - Wearable (clip) that is automatically tracking focus, flow, relaxation, fatigue and stress.
• Apple Shortcuts - Powerful automation app (iOS).
• Everyday Data Science (2021) - Andrew N Carr (cheaper PDF version)
• awesome CANstars673 - A curated list of awesome CAN bus tools, hardware and resources.
• mqtt_bridgestars126 - Provides a functionality to bridge between ROS and MQTT in bidirectional.
• BlazorTypewriterstars11 - A typewriter effect for Blazor.
• Razor Pages has Components too don't you know - March 2, 2021 - Razor Pages has Components too don't you know.
• How Can We Complete a Knowledge Graph?
• Protectumus - Free website security check, site antivirus and server firewall (WAF) for PHP. Email notifications for registered users in free tier.

• Mendix — Rapid Application Development for Enterprises, unlimited number of free sandbox environments supporting unlimited users, 0.5 GB storage and 1 GB RAM per app. Also Studio and Studio Pro IDEs are allowed in free tier.
• yew-train-ticketstars4 - A Rust WebAssembly Webapp example basing Yew newest hooks and functional API, the code style is extremely like React Function Component.
• https://rsshub.wkfg.me/ by @三丰
• Friday Front-end. 15 great Front-end articles, tutorials, and announcements every Friday. Sections for CSS/SCSS, JavaScript, and other awesome stuff. Archive.
• Best of JavaScript. Weekly rankings about the most popular open-source projects related to Node.js and the web platform.
• JavaScript Kicks. Curated list of the top-rated articles from the community of JavaScript developers sent weekly.
• Android Weekly. Free newsletter that helps you to stay cutting-edge with your Android Development.
• Trending Projects. A weekly email showcasing trending projects on GitHub.
